name: Zinrelo Enterprise Loyalty Rewards API
what_it_does: Zinrelo enterprise loyalty rewards REST API for mid-market and enterprise e-commerce brands to build and manage multi-dimensional loyalty programs with points, tiers, cash back, gamification, and referrals using machine learning-powered segmentation and analytics for customer lifetime value optimization. Enables AI agents to manage loyalty member enrollment for enterprise retention automation, handle point accrual and activity events for loyalty earning automation, access tier management and upgrade for loyalty progression automation, retrieve rewards redemption and coupon generation for checkout incentive automation, manage referral tracking for viral customer acquisition automation, handle cash back and store credit for flexible loyalty reward automation, access ML-powered segment insights for loyalty personalization automation, retrieve analytics and CLV reporting for retention optimization automation, manage gamification badges and challenges for engagement automation, and integrate Zinrelo with Shopify, Magento, BigCommerce, Salesforce, and enterprise e-commerce platforms for end-to-end loyalty automation.
use_cases: Managing multi-dimensional loyalty points from enterprise retention agents
Triggering tier upgrades from loyalty progression automation agents
Generating reward redemption coupons from checkout incentive agents
Analyzing customer CLV with loyalty data from retention optimization agents
not_for: Simple stamp card loyalty (Zinrelo is multi-dimensional enterprise, not basic punch card)
B2B loyalty programs (Zinrelo is B2C e-commerce focused)
Small SMB loyalty (Zinrelo requires significant implementation, more suitable for mid-market+)
best_when: A mid-market to enterprise e-commerce brand wanting AI agents to automate multi-dimensional loyalty program management, ML-powered member segmentation, tier progression, and reward fulfillment through Zinrelo's enterprise loyalty platform.
avoid_when: IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRES ZINRELO ONBOARDING: Zinrelo enterprise setup requires professional services engagement for program configuration; automated standalone API integration without onboarding creates misconfigured loyalty rules. ACTIVITY EVENT CONFIGURATION PRECEDES API: Zinrelo loyalty activities (purchase, review, social share) must be configured in dashboard before API events produce points; automated event sending to unconfigured activity creates event accepted but no points awarded. ML MODELS REQUIRE DATA VOLUME: Zinrelo ML-powered segmentation requires sufficient transaction history for reliable segments; automated ML-driven personalization for new brand on Zinrelo creates low-confidence segment recommendations. PLATFORM SDK PREFERRED OVER RAW API: Zinrelo provides platform-specific SDKs for Shopify, Magento; automated integration via Zinrelo's platform SDK preferred over raw REST API; automated custom REST API integration requires additional error handling that SDKs provide.

auth.notes: Zinrelo uses API key + Partner ID for authentication. REST API with JSON. Pleasanton, CA HQ. Founded 2012 by Samir Palnitkar. Self-funded. Products: Points loyalty, cash back, tiers, gamification, referrals, ML segmentation. SDKs: Node.js, PHP, Python. GDPR. SOC2. Shopify Plus Partner. Serves mid-market e-commerce. Competes with LoyaltyLion and Antavo.

pricing.paid_tiers: Custom pricing based on active members and program features; typically $299-$2,000+/month
pricing.notes: Pleasanton CA. Self-funded. Monthly subscription by active member count. Demo and onboarding required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; activity and member APIs throttled; webhooks for loyalty events

known_agent_gotchas: PARTNER ID REQUIRED WITH API KEY: Zinrelo authentication requires both API key and Partner ID; automated API call with only API key creates authentication failure; automated integration must pass both credentials

ACTIVITY CONFIGURATION MUST PRECEDE EVENTS: Zinrelo point-earning activities must be configured in dashboard; automated event sending without activity configuration creates event received but no loyalty action; automated check for activity existence before sending events required

MEMBER POINT BALANCE MUST BE CHECKED BEFORE REDEMPTION: Zinrelo point redemption requires sufficient balance; automated redemption must fetch member balance first; automated redemption without balance check creates insufficient points error at redemption

CASH BACK vs POINTS REDEMPTION DIFFERENT ENDPOINTS: Zinrelo cash back and points redemption use different API endpoints; automated checkout must call correct redemption type; automated points endpoint for cash back creates wrong redemption type processed

GAMIFICATION CHALLENGE COMPLETION IS AUTOMATED BY ZINRELO: Zinrelo gamification challenge completion is evaluated by Zinrelo on event receipt; automated challenge completion trigger is not via direct API; automated manual challenge completion override via API creates unsupported operation error
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise loyalty. GDPR, SOC2. API key + Partner ID. US. Customer loyalty and behavioral data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise loyalty. GDPR, SOC2. API key. US. Customer loyalty data.
